_comment: Each case tests one thing the agent should handle. Fields:
id              — unique identifier for this case
input           — the user message to send to the agent
expected_tools  — (optional) tools the agent SHOULD call, in order
expected_output — (optional) substring or description of correct output
context_docs    — (optional) ground-truth docs for hallucination scoring
metadata        — (optional) tags for filtering (e.g. category, priority)
Without --judge, only deterministic tool-usage scoring runs.
Compare two eval runs for regressions:
